title: Establishment of fund
doc_html:
§3690.10.  Establishment of fund

The Jefferson Parish council is hereby authorized to establish such a fund as may be necessary to provide for the cost of the said improvements not covered by the cash payments.

Acts 1962, No. 256, §10.
